since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -4.66% · Gold -3.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.62%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BBAI is the standout at -6.37%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +4.39%, UPST +3.80%, WDAY +3.27%, PUBM +3.13%, SYM +2.49%. Laggards: BBAI -6.37%, SMR -6.31%, MDB -5.79%, INOD -5.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.10% at $154.39
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
